description: From the Publisher Rose Gold Glitz Add-On Items Add a touch of glitz and glamour to your Birthday Party and dazzle your guests with these simple and elegant designs! A great selection of tableware, accessories and decorations will let you celebrate those milestone moments in style! Are you having helium balloons? Don’t forget the curling ribbon and weights! product_details_tab_data.Safety Warning: Warning: Choking Hazard - Children under 8 years can choke or suffocate on uninflated or broken balloons. Adult supervision required. Keep uninflated balloons from children. Discard broken balloons at once. MADE OF NATURAL RUBBER LATEX. STRETCH BALLOONS BEFORE INFLATING. To protect the eyes from possible damage, the use of a balloon pump is recommended.
